location: Guaranteed drop from the Abductor Virgin duo boss fight beneath Volcano Manor, reached through a cave south of the Subterranean Inquisition Chamber grace.
tactics: One Virgin fights with a spinning wheel weapon, the other with a swinging sickle, and they gang up — use the room's pillars to break line of sight and isolate one at a time

Fastest access: let a regular Abductor Virgin near Raya Lucaria Academy's elevator grab you (use a Sacrificial Twig to avoid losing runes) to warp straight into this Volcano Manor arena, or approach on foot from Temple of Eiglay grace
From Subterranean Inquisition Chamber grace, jump across the pillars to the south and follow the cave to the boss fog
Their grab attacks hit extremely hard against low health/poise builds — watch for stance-break windows instead of trading blows
lore: Originally an instrument of torture — its many spikes were driven into flesh and then set alight, the smell of the burning wound meant to break a victim's spirit as much as their body.

builds.name: Faith bleed poke
builds.why: D-scaling across Strength, Dexterity and Faith, innate fire damage, and a hefty built-in blood loss buildup (50) make it a solid Faith/bleed hybrid weapon
